title: Room Types
description: Create and manage distinct room categories to organize your inventory, set occupancy and pricing rules, and simplify rate and reservation management.
no_property_loaded: Property information could not be loaded. Please ensure you are assigned to a property.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage room types. Please contact an administrator.

edit_modal.title: Edit Room Type
edit_modal.description: Manage the details and amenities for this room type. Pricing is managed via Rate Plans.

add_modal.title: Add New Room Type
add_modal.description: Manage the details and amenities for this room type. Pricing is managed via Rate Plans.

form.default_rate_description: Reference rate. Active pricing via Rate Plans.
form.room_numbers_description: Enter specific room numbers or names assigned to this type.
form.beds_description: Specify the number of each bed type available in this room category.
form.description_placeholder: Brief description of the room type.
form.amenities_description: Choose all amenities that apply to this room type.

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Type Name, Default Rate, and Max Guests are required.

success_delete.title: Success
success_delete.description: Room type and its associations deleted.

confirm_delete: Are you sure? This will delete the room type, all its rooms, and associated rate plans. This action cannot be undone.

view_modal.title: Room Type Details
view_modal.description: Viewing details for this room type.

no_room_types: No room types found. Add one to get started.
